examples: Our children have left home, and we now want to redecorate.
Americans redecorate their houses and offices every few years.
When we bought the house, it was structurally sound, but I decided to redecorate throughout.
Our TVs will last until they break down and our sofas will not be renewed when we redecorate.
The couple decided to marry, but Mrs Crompton was not happy in her husband's house and wanted to redecorate.
